title: Mafish-Crossbow（马夫鱼的弩）
description: The original Crossbow is enhanced to shoot all items. There is a nesting system, a correction system. Custom edits can be made to the projectiles. 原版十字弩增强，可以射出所有物品。有嵌套系统，修正系统。可以对射出的投射物进行自定义编辑。
body:
# Mafish‑Crossbow（马夫鱼的弩）

## 简介：
马夫鱼的弩（Mafish‑Crossbow） 是一款极大扩展原版十字弩玩法的 Minecraft 模组，它允许十字弩发射任何物品，包括嵌套的十字弩（Crossbow）和收纳袋（Bundle），会再次嵌套触发。  
模组特色包括：

- 支持“弩发弩”嵌套射击；
- 使用收纳袋同时发射多个物品；
- 烟花火箭可在空中引爆收纳袋，实现连锁效果，而且携带烟花爆炸的粒子效果；
- 自动检测网络包是否过大并替换为结构空位以防崩溃；
- 附魔矫正系统，可自由修改投射物行为（如追踪、反弹等）；
- 可以在生存模式获得对应的附魔；
- 敌对生物捡起十字弩也可以触发对应效果，如果含有无限，则可以一直发射对应弹药。

本模组不上传任何数据，也不绕过 Mojang 的安全限制。

## 推荐理由：
如果你想尝试用矿车、方块、鸡蛋、黑洞、甚至另一个十字弩作为十字弩的弹药，那么马夫鱼33开发的这款模组将为你带来全新的游戏体验。

## 使用方法：
将任意物品（例如收纳袋、十字弩、烟花等）装入十字弩并正常射击即可。  
你可以为十字弩附上“追踪”附魔，使发射的物品（如矿车）自动锁定敌人；  
你可以使用多层收纳袋搭配烟花，制造出空中连锁爆炸的视觉效果；  
你甚至可以连续嵌套结构空位与多重射击，发射出巨型黑洞摧毁整片地形……  

各种物品/附魔修正的使用详细简介都在创造物品栏可以看到。

## 授权许可：
默认使用 “All Rights Reserved”。

---

## Overview:
Mafish‑Crossbow is a Minecraft mod that greatly expands the vanilla crossbow, allowing it to fire any item—including nested crossbows and Bundles, which will themselves trigger recursively.  
Key features include:

- Supports recursive “crossbow firing crossbow” behavior;
- Bundles can be used to fire multiple items simultaneously;
- Fireworks can detonate Bundles mid-air, creating chained explosions along with firework particle effects;
- Automatically detects oversized packets and replaces them with structure voids to prevent crashes;
- Enchantment correction system allows custom projectile behavior (e.g. homing, bouncing, etc.);
- Custom enchantments are available in survival mode;
- Hostile mobs that pick up crossbows will also trigger effects, and can fire endlessly with the Infinity enchantment.

This mod does not upload any data and does not bypass Mojang's security restrictions.

## Why You Should Try It:
If you've ever wanted to use minecarts, blocks, eggs, black holes—or even another crossbow—as ammo, Mafuyu33’s mod offers a truly new and creative experience for crossbow combat.

## How to Use:
Load any item (such as Bundles, crossbows, fireworks, etc.) into a crossbow and shoot as usual.  
You can enchant the crossbow with “Tracking” to make projectiles like minecarts lock onto targets.
You can use multiple nested Bundles with fireworks to create dramatic chain explosions in mid-air.
You can even nest structure voids with Multishot to fire massive black holes and devastate entire terrain.  

All corrected projectile/enchantment combinations are viewable in the creative inventory.

## License:
Default license is “All Rights Reserved”.
